name: Keith Richards
description: British musician, guitarist of the Rolling Stones
abstract: Keith Richards (born 18 December 1943) is an English musician, songwriter, singer and record producer who is an original member, guitarist, secondary vocalist, and co-principal songwriter of the Rolling Stones. His songwriting partnership with the band's lead vocalist Mick Jagger is one of the most successful in history.

works.t: I Just Want to Make Love to You
I Just Want to Make Love to You

about_quotes.speaker: Ramsey Lewis
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee Ramsey Lewis does not mention Keith Richards in his response; the mention is solely from the interviewer's question.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ramsey Lewis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Lou Pallo
about_quotes.evidence: We did 16 CDs and I have them all home... most of the things I do with Keith are standards.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lou Pallo interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 14, 2007

about_quotes.speaker: Tim Ries
about_quotes.evidence: luckily I’ve known them now for 23 years... they’ve had me back all these years and so it’s been great to have this gig for so long.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tim Ries interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 19, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Paul Shaffer
about_quotes.evidence: Keith Richards likes to explain you know it had both elements... another guy who has studied this stuff, he says well he was the real leader of the band.
about_quotes.doc_title: Paul Shaffer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 24, 2023
